creator: rfarmer@predatorlabs.net
text:
There are a few issues I'd like to get addressed before this is
committed. I'll work on it tomorrow:

1) I'm getting a duplicate copy of the documentation installed in
${PREFIX}/share/dklibs/doc/dklibs/
2) The configuration file doesn't seem to be getting installed properly
3) Keeping the plist in sorted order is nice
4) I'd like to get the <sys/termios.h> warnings taken care of, if possible
5) Testing for and marking it MAKE_JOBS_SAFE wouldn't hurt

http://www.predatorlabs.net/dl/dklibs-1.27.0.log

-- 
Rob Farmer
